nasb.text: Then the men of Jabesh said, “Tomorrow we will come out to you, and you may do to us whatever seems good to you.”

esv.text: Therefore the men of Jabesh said, “Tomorrow we will give ourselves up to you, and you may do to us whatever seems good to you.”

cnv.text: 雅比人對亞捫人說：“明天我們出來向你們投降，你們看怎麼好，就怎麼待我們吧。”

ccb.text: 便对亚扪人说：“明天我们会出来归顺你们，你们怎样对待我们都可以。”
